[category]
matching
[prompt]
In Alice's Wonderland, secret processing rules are used on text.

x: not matched anywhere
y: matched but wrong position

0 01100001 3
1 10100011 4
2 11011101 6
3 01101101 5
4 00000000 a
5 00000000 a
6 00000101 2
7 10001100 3

01 10 00000100 1
12 21 00001000 1
23 32 00010000 1
34 43 00000000 a match 4 5
45 54 00100001 2
56 65 10000001 2
67 76 01001101 4
70 07 00000101 2 match 6

02 20 00000000 a match 4 5
13 31 00000000 a match 4 5
24 42 00100000 1
35 53 00000000 a match 4 5
46 64 01000001 2
57 75 00100001 2
60 06 00000101 2 match 6
71 17 00001100 2

03 30 00000000 a match 4 5
14 41 00000000 a match 4 5
25 52 00100000 1
36 63 00010000 1
47 74 01100001 3 match 0
50 05 00000001 1
61 16 10001100 3 match 7
72 27 00101000 2

04 40 00000001 1
15 51 10000000 1
26 62 00011000 2
37 73 00000000 a match 4 5
